post.title: EDNS
post.bodyHtml:
这个DNS系列现在有以下几篇文章
DNS EDNS DNSSEC DNS over HTTPS 完整代码请看DNS

EDNS

上一篇我们写了DNS,EDNS就是DNS的功能扩充.
上一篇的DNS里头部有ARCOUNT的计数,EDNS就包含在那个里面,EDNS发送的请求在请求头之后的Additional中,应答在Answer和Authoritative之后,我们可看以下图,跟清晰了吧

1    +---------------------+2    |        Header       |3    +---------------------+4    |       Question      | the question for the name server5    +---------------------+6    |        Answer       | RRs answering the question7    +---------------------+8    |      Authority      | RRs pointing toward an authority9    +---------------------+10    |      Additional     | RRs holding additional information11    +---------------------+12

协议格式

具体协议内容请看rfc2671,rfc7871

Additinoal包含以下部分

1     Field Name   Field Type     Description2     ------------------------------------------------------3     NAME         domain name    empty (root domain)4     TYPE         u_int16_t      OPT5     CLASS        u_int16_t      sender's UDP payload size6     TTL          u_int32_t      extended RCODE and flags7     RDLEN        u_int16_t      describes RDATA8     RDATA        octet stream   {attribute,value} pairs910 11TTL中的东西并不是我们之前说到的TTL,这里的TTL只是一个名称,没有具体的含义,TTL中包含以下内容12 13                      +0 (MSB)                            +1 (LSB)14      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+15   0: |         EXTENDED-RCODE        |            VERSION            |16      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+17   2: |                               Z                               |18      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+1920 21   EXTENDED-RCODE  Forms upper 8 bits of extended 12-bit RCODE.  Note22                   that EXTENDED-RCODE value "0" indicates that an23                   unextended RCODE is in use (values "0" through "15").24   VERSION         EDNS VERSION25   Z               Set to zero by senders and ignored by receivers,26                   unless modified in a subsequent specification.2728这里Z我们之后会用到(不是这一篇文章)29 30 31RDATA中就是对各种扩充功能的请求字段,而每个不同的功能又有着不同的请求协议32RDATA的格式如下33 34                +0 (MSB)                            +1 (LSB)35     +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+36  0: |                          OPTION-CODE                          |37     +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+38  2: |                         OPTION-LENGTH                         |39     +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+40  4: |                                                               |41     /                          OPTION-DATA                          /42     /                                                               /43     +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+4445   OPTION-CODE    (Assigned by IANA.)46   OPTION-LENGTH  Size (in octets) of OPTION-DATA.47   OPTION-DATA    Varies per OPTION-CODE.48 49如SubNet中的请求字段就包含在其中RDATA中,所以我们要先完成SubNet的字节数组50才能生成一个Additional,因为请求中需要数据的长度RDLEN

因为EDNS中扩展的协议非常多,这里我们就以常用的SubNet为例吧,更多其他类型请看dns-parameters
因为我们以SubNet为例,所以先要了解下SubNet的具体协议格式

1                +0 (MSB)                            +1 (LSB)2      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+3   0: |                          OPTION-CODE                          |4      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+5   2: |                         OPTION-LENGTH                         |6      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+7   4: |                            FAMILY                             |8      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+9   6: |     SOURCE PREFIX-LENGTH      |     SCOPE PREFIX-LENGTH       |10      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+11   8: |                           ADDRESS...                          /12      +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+1314   o  SOURCE PREFIX-LENGTH, an unsigned octet representing the leftmost15      number of significant bits of ADDRESS to be used for the lookup.16      In responses, it mirrors the same value as in the queries.1718   o  SCOPE PREFIX-LENGTH, an unsigned octet representing the leftmost19      number of significant bits of ADDRESS that the response covers.20      In queries, it MUST be set to 0.2122   o  ADDRESS, variable number of octets, contains either an IPv4 or23      IPv6 address, depending on FAMILY, which MUST be truncated to the24      number of bits indicated by the SOURCE PREFIX-LENGTH field,25      padding with 0 bits to pad to the end of the last octet needed.26

这里前面三个字段就是我们之前RDATA中规定的协议格式,后面就是SubNet的格式
SubNet的OPTION-CODE为8,
OPTION-LENGTH就是完成之后的长度
FAMILY表示设置的IP的类型 IPv4为1,IPv6为2 更多类型请看address-family-numbers
SOURCE PREFIX-LENGTH为查询中位置偏移(就是CIDR中的mask),具体请了解CIDR,是计算机网络很基础的知识
SCOPE PREFIX-LENGTH是响应返回的位置偏移,在查询中应为0
ADDRESS就是设置的SubNet的IP地址,依据上面的FAMILY

请求

看过具体协议格式规定后,我们就可以来完成代码了

先定义以下各种请求的OPTION-CODE

1var (2	Reserved         = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000000} //03	LLQ              = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000001} //1 Optional4	UL               = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000010} //2 On-hold5	NSID             = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000011} //3 Standard6	Reserved2        = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000100} //47	DAU              = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000101} //5 Standard8	DHU              = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000110} //6 Standard9	N3U              = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00000111} //7 Standard10	EdnsClientSubnet = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001000} //8 Optional11	EDNSEXPIRE       = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001001} //9 Optional12	COOKIE           = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001010} //10 Standard13	TcpKeepalive     = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001011} //11 Standard14	Padding          = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001100} //12 Standard15	CHAIN            = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001101} //13 Standard16	KEYTAG           = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001110} //14 Optional17	ExtendedDNSError = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00001111} //15 Standard18	EDNSClientTag    = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00010000} //16 Optional19	EDNSServerTag    = EDNSOPT{0b00000000, 0b00010001} //17 Optional20)

然后完成SubNet的

1func createEdnsClientSubnet(ip net.IP) []byte {2	optionCode := []byte{EdnsClientSubnet[0], EdnsClientSubnet[1]}3 4	family := []byte{0b00000000, 0b00000001} // 1:Ipv4 2:IPv6 https://www.iana.org/assignments/address-family-numbers/address-family-numbers.xhtml5	sourceNetmask := []byte{0b00100000}      // 326	scopeNetmask := []byte{0b00000000}       //0 In queries, it MUST be set to 0.7	subnet := ip.To4()                       //depending family8	if subnet == nil {9		subnet = ip.To16()10		family = []byte{0b00000000, 0b00000010}11	}12	optionData := bytes.Join([][]byte{family, sourceNetmask, scopeNetmask, subnet}, []byte{})13 14	optionLength := getLength(len(optionData))15 16	return bytes.Join([][]byte{optionCode, optionLength[:], optionData}, []byte{})17}

再完成Additional,加上完整的请求头,注意这里我们要修改一下请求头中ArCount的大小

1func createEDNSReq(domain string, reqType2 reqType, eDNS []byte) []byte {2	normalReq := creatRequest(domain, reqType2)3	normalReq[10] = 0b000000004	normalReq[11] = 0b000000015	name := []byte{0b00000000}6	typeR := []byte{0b00000000, 0b00101001}       //417	payloadSize := []byte{0b00010000, 0b00000000} //40968	extendRcode := []byte{0b00000000}9	eDNSVersion := []byte{0b00000000}10	z := []byte{0b00000000, 0b00000000}11	var dataLength [2]byte12	if eDNS != nil {13		dataLength = getLength(len(eDNS))14	}15	return bytes.Join([][]byte{normalReq, name, typeR, payloadSize, extendRcode, eDNSVersion, z, dataLength[:], eDNS}, []byte{})16}

应答

我们先分析一下应答的解析顺序,就跟最开始的一样

  • Header
  • Answer
  • Authority
  • Additional

Header和Answer的解析我们上一篇已经完成了,这里需要完成Authority和Additional

因为我们不需要Authority内的具体内容,这里我们就直接获取到Authority之后的数据就行了

1func resolveAuthoritative(c []byte, nsCount int, b []byte) (left []byte) {2	for nsCount != 0 {3		nsCount--4		_, _, c = getName(c, b)5		c = c[2:] // type6		c = c[2:] // class7		c = c[4:] // ttl8		dataLength := int(c[0])<<8 + int(c[1])9		c = c[2:] // data length10		c = c[dataLength:]11	}12	return c13}

Additional, SubNet

1func resolveAdditional(b []byte, arCount int) {2	for arCount != 0 {3		arCount--4		//name := b[:1]5		b = b[1:]6		typeE := b[:2]7		b = b[2:]8		//payLoadSize := b[:2]9		b = b[2:]10		//rCode := b[:1]11		b = b[1:]12		//version := b[:1]13		b = b[1:]14		//z := b[:2]15		b = b[2:]16		dataLength := int(b[0])<<8 + int(b[1])17		b = b[2:]18		//log.Println(name, typeE, payLoadSize, rCode, version, z, dataLength)19		if typeE[0] != 0 || typeE[1] != 41 {20			//optData := b[:dataLength]21			b = b[dataLength:]22			continue23		}24 25		if dataLength == 0 {26			continue27		}28		optCode := EDNSOPT{b[0], b[1]}29		b = b[2:]30		optionLength := int(b[0])<<8 + int(b[1])31		b = b[2:]32		switch optCode {33		case EdnsClientSubnet:34			//family := b[:2]35			b = b[2:]36			//sourceNetmask := b[:1]37			//log.Println("sourceNetmask", sourceNetmask)38			b = b[1:]39			//scopeNetmask := b[:1]40			//log.Println("scopeNetmask", scopeNetmask)41			b = b[1:]42			// Subnet IP43			//if family[0] == 0 && family[1] == 1 {44			//	log.Println(b[:4])45			//}46			//if family[0] == 0 && family[1] == 2 {47			//	log.Println(b[:16])48			//}49 50			b = b[optionLength-4:]51		default:52			//log.Println("opt data:", b[:optionLength])53			b = b[optionLength:]54		}55	}56}

最后需要在之前的DNS分析加上这两个函数,完整代码请看开头
